name: goosefly99-plugins-auto-dev

plugins.name: dev-automation-auto-dev
plugins.description: Project design, documentation scaffolding, and autonomous scheduled development tasks.

plugins.description: MCP server for YouTube search, transcripts, and video analysis

plugins.name: x-api-mcp-auto-dev
plugins.description: X (Twitter) API MCP server - authenticated crawler, client, and query tools

plugins.name: synth-mcp-auto-dev
plugins.description: Research synthesis MCP server - load research collections, query items, and generate structured design specs

plugins.name: feature-request-auto-dev
plugins.description: MCP tool for agents to record feature suggestions into feature_requests.toml files

plugins.name: concepts-collector-auto-dev
plugins.description: Research concepts collector MCP server - load collections, extract key concepts, and generate structured knowledge base overviews

plugins.name: caveman-mode-auto-dev
plugins.description: Terse-response skill that drops filler, articles, and pleasantries while preserving correctness. Distilled from the viral caveman prompt and Guzik's benchmark.

plugins.name: pipeline-orchestrator-auto-dev
plugins.description: Pipeline orchestrator MCP server - reads pipeline.toml, resolves DAG, validates artifacts, manages run state, and coordinates research/debate/synth phases

plugins.name: agent-knowledgebase-auto-dev
plugins.description: Personal knowledgebase plugin — ingest sources, build wiki artifacts, query with vector search

plugins.name: crawler-mcp-auto-dev
plugins.description: MCP server exposing web crawling capabilities via crawl4ai and Playwright

plugins.name: claude-context-audit-auto-dev
plugins.description: Audit your Claude Code setup for token waste and context bloat. Scans MCP servers, CLAUDE.md rules, skills, settings, and permissions, then returns a health score with specific fixes.

plugins.name: obsidian-mcp-auto-dev
plugins.description: MCP server for Obsidian vaults: consolidated note-with-graph envelope, graph traversal, lint primitives, file-watch events, transactional batch writes, multi-vault federation, Karpathy protocol-fixtures trio read

plugins.name: agent-code-validation-auto-dev
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin that lets agents truly validate the correctness of code they write. Sandbox MCP + skills wrapping Hypothesis/Stryker/mutmut/CrossHair/Atheris/Inspect AI + tamper-evident Auditor subagent invoked from Stop/SubagentStop hooks that re-runs declared-passing verification in a clean sandbox the primary agent could not have touched.

plugins.name: claude-code-optimization-auto-dev
plugins.description: Audit and optimize Claude Code: a context/token-waste auditor and a custom multi-line PowerShell statusline.
